{{Infobox character
| name = Haresh
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| titles = Arbiter of Betrayal, Arbiter
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Haresh is known as the [[Arbiter]] of Betrayal. Introduced by [[Grandmaster Naraka]], he serves a judicial role centered on punishing those who have violated trust. He uses an ash-gray rope to carry out death sentences, specifically through hanging. During his actions, he has pronounced [[King]] [[Zakareth]] guilty and targeted the Heir of [[Damasca]], [[Talos]], for perceived betrayals. Haresh has been observed emerging from the [[Ragnarus Gate]] and interacting with the silver doors of the [[Vault]].}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Haresh is a non-human, red-skinned old man who serves as an [[Arbiter]]. Known specifically as the [[Arbiter]] of Betrayal, he carries a long noose crafted from ash. This ash-gray rope serves as a defining tool of his station.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Haresh]] is the [[Arbiter]] of Betrayal.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Haresh]] is a red-skinned old man who is not human.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Haresh]] has a long gray noose made of ash.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Haresh]] is an [[Arbiter]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Haresh]] uses an ash-gray rope.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|“Your Majesty, meet Haresh, Arbiter of Betrayal.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
